overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic flying vehicle taking off from an elevated highway platform and navigating through the neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City at night. The vehicle flies through dense urban canyons before transitioning to the suburban North Oak area with winding hillside roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway platform with neon advertisements

events.description: flying vehicle takes off from the elevated platform and begins ascending

agents.ego_description: futuristic flying car taking off from an elevated highway platform and ascending into the neon-lit city

entered.detail: futuristic elevated highway with striped safety markings and glowing edges
large pink neon billboard with 'LOVE PUNK' text
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic elevated highway platform at night, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The flying vehicle takes off from the platform, ascending between the glass towers as the camera follows from behind, capturing the dense cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with neon billboards and tight corridors

events.description: vehicle makes sharp right turn between closely packed skyscrapers
vehicle banks left through narrow corridor with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: flying car navigating at high speed through narrow urban canyons, making sharp turns between skyscrapers

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with yellow background and portrait
red neon sign with 'ATARU STADIUM' text on building facade
distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with red illuminated rings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies through narrow urban canyons between towering skyscrapers, with neon billboards and advertisements covering the building facades. The camera follows the car as it makes sharp banking turns through the tight corridors, with the yellow billboard and Ataru Stadium sign visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban transition zone with highway interchange approaching suburban hills

events.description: exiting dense downtown skyscrapers into more open airspace with visible horizon
North Oak sign becomes visible on the hillside ahead

agents.ego_description: flying car exiting the dense urban core and descending slightly toward the North Oak suburban area

entered.detail: large illuminated sign on hillside spelling 'North Oak' in white letters
curved elevated highway with glowing lane markings below
dark rolling hills with scattered lights marking residential areas

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the dense urban canyons into open airspace, revealing the wider cityscape and the North Oak sign on the distant hillside. The scene transitions from the enclosed neon-lit downtown to a more open area with winding highway ramps and suburban hills visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential hills with illuminated winding roads

events.description: vehicle banks right following the curved highway through the hills

agents.ego_description: flying car cruising over the suburban hills of North Oak, following the illuminated winding roads with the city skyline visible in the distance

entered.detail: distant view of the downtown skyscrapers with neon lights on the horizon
scattered residential structures with illuminated windows on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies over the dark suburban hills of North Oak, with the illuminated winding roads creating light patterns below. The North Oak sign remains visible on the left while the distant downtown skyline glows on the horizon. The camera follows the car as it banks along the curved highway route through the residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a flying vehicle ascends from a dense, neon-lit urban core and glides toward the open, dark hills of a suburban district. It begins on an elevated highway platform, ascending between towering glass skyscrapers draped in glowing advertisements. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene tightens into narrow urban canyons where the camera follows sharp banking turns past yellow billboards and the Ataru Stadium sign. The environment then opens into wide airspace, shifting from the enclosed neon corridors of downtown toward the distant hillside marked by the North Oak sign. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle as it banks over the dark residential slopes of North Oak, where illuminated winding roads create light patterns below against the glowing horizon of the distant city skyline.
